title: PUBLIC HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: YAMHILL NEWBERG CLINIC PUBLIC HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Public health services provided by a nurse or nurse practitioner. Services include annual gynecological checkups (pap smears, breast and pelvic exams), testing and treatment of sexually transmitted infections (STIs) for men and women, pregnancy testing and options counseling for pregnant women, health education (including breast self-exam and testicular self-exam instruction), child/adult immunizations, and maternal and child health care. 2318 N Portland Road Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Immunizations only the 2nd Friday of each month (503) 434-7525 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 434-7525 Main phone (503) 554-7842 Alternate INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service. Sliding scale fees may be availalbe for uninsured patients. Children in need of vaccinations are not turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Childhood Immunization General Medical Care Pap Tests Postpartum Care Pregnancy Testing Prenatal Care Pro-Choice Pregnancy Counseling Public Clinics Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YAMHILL NEWBERG CLINIC
